title: phyteuma spicatum subsp. pyrenaicum
intro: Phyteuma spicatum subsp. pyrenaicum, also known as the Spanish rattlesnake plant or Pyrenean rattlesnake plant, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the bellflower family. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Phyteuma spicatum subsp. pyrenaicum include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce pain and inflammation. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
